properties.description: Load all 8 source CSVs from Blob to SQL staging

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dwh.fact_Sales)    +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dwh.fact_Leads)    +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dwh.fact_Viewings) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dwh.fact_Offers)   AS [RowCount]
